steps.note: Phase 1: NO face, NO LED -- deterministic voice-only enrollment via the enroll keyword (not the fragile passive self-intro).

steps.say: Hello there, how is it going?
steps.expect: unknown_1 small talk, zero crops anywhere
unified enroll latches, asks for the name
confirm-back: Otis -- did I get that right?
[COMMIT] otis voice=True face=False -> KNOWN-BUT-FACE-LESS (the Tushar precondition)

steps.note: Phase 2: face + LED appear. OLD code: '[ANCHOR] ... skip co-sample' forever (the catch-22). FIX: unrecognized anchored face + known face-less voice -> crops bind silently.

steps.expect: speaker=otis; FIX branch fills cosample, NO skip line

steps.say: I am really glad to be here today.

steps.note: Phase 3: commit the buffered crops -- the recovery flow Tushar never had.

steps.expect: gather takes crops_for(otis) = the buffer the FIX filled; asks name
